mapper.select: SELECT wo.*, fd.device_code, fd.device_name, cu.real_name AS creator_name, au.real_name AS assignee_name, pu.real_name AS processor_name, ru.real_name AS reviewer_name FROM device_work_order wo LEFT JOIN factory_device fd ON wo.device_id = fd.device_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON wo.creator_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON wo.assignee_id = au.id LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON wo.processor_id = pu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON wo.reviewer_id = ru.id WHERE wo.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as processing, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) as completionRate, ROUND(AVG(handle_duration), 2) as avgHandleDuration, ROUND(AVG(evaluation_score), 2) as avgEvaluationScore FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId}) AND create_time >= CASE #{timeRange} WHEN 'week' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) WHEN 'month' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHEN 'quarter' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) ELSE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) END

SELECT order_status as status, CASE order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待处理' WHEN 1 THEN '处理中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '已审核' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' END as statusName, COUNT(*) as count FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId}) AND create_time >= CASE #{timeRange} WHEN 'week' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) WHEN 'month' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHEN 'quarter' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) ELSE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) END GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY order_status

SELECT priority, CASE priority WHEN 1 THEN '紧急' WHEN 2 THEN '高' WHEN 3 THEN '中' WHEN 4 THEN '低' END as priorityName, COUNT(*) as count FROM device_work_order WHERE (assignee_id = #{userId} OR creator_id = #{userId}) AND create_time >= CASE #{timeRange} WHEN 'week' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) WHEN 'month' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHEN 'quarter' THEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) ELSE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) END GROUP BY priority ORDER BY priority
